title: I Had Some Help
why_this_song: I Had Some Help by Post Malone (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: It ain't like I can make this kinda mess all by myself
Don't act like you ain't help me pull that bottle off the shelf
Been deep in every weekend if you couldn't tell

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "help" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "help" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ain't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ain't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You got a lotta nerve, don't you, baby?
Can't wash our hands of this

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're tellin' all your friends that I'm crazy
Guess it's catchin' up to you, huh

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Had Some Help" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Had Some Help" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Had Some Help", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Had Some Help", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "I Had Some Help" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "I Had Some Help" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
